metadata.title: Gasparro Fotografia | Wedding Photography
metadata.description: Photography studio specializing in weddings, maternity and newborns in Puglia and Italy. Modern and sophisticated photography.

navigation.logoAlt: Gasparro Fotografia Logo - Photography studio specializing in weddings

intro.title: EVERY DETAIL SPEAKS OF YOU:
intro.description: Our studio is in constant pursuit of Beauty. As a Wedding Photographer in Puglia, our vision of photography and video is Modern & Sophisticated, spontaneously capturing every detail and every person with poetic sensitivity and an editorial touch. It will be an immersive journey into the beauty of your event, because you deserve a unique memory that lives forever.
intro.subtitle: That is why we preserve your most genuine moments, so you can relive love in every glance.

parallax.description: At Gasparro Fotografia, we are committed to telling your story and that of your wedding day by naturally capturing the details, people and authentic interactions that make it unique.

gallerySection.title: Our Shots
gallerySection.description: We tell the magic of your most special day with shots that go beyond the image. We do not just photograph — we capture emotions, details, unique moments that speak of you. A sudden smile, a gentle touch, a glance that says everything without words. Every photograph becomes a living memory, capable of taking you back in time and letting you relive those feelings. Our goal is to transform every moment into an eternal emotion, because your story deserves to be cherished forever.

items.title: Weddings
items.description: We capture every precious moment of your special day with artistic sensitivity and emotional intensity. From the most intimate rituals to the grandest celebrations.

items.title: Maternity
items.description: We celebrate the wonderful journey of motherhood with elegant and intimate portraits that tell the story of anticipation and joy of this unique moment.

items.title: Newborns
items.description: Gentle and safe sessions that immortalize the first moments of life. Artistic portraits that preserve the miracle of birth with tenderness and care.

finalSection.title: THE NEXT CHAPTER
finalSection.subtitle: Discover the opportunities created for you
